finding_results.notes: Replaced both abstract transition summaries with concrete physical action: position negotiation on the narrow bed, shoulder-limited movement, Lena guiding entry, the resumed slower repositioning, and Kai's bodily sensations immediately before Lena's desync.
Kept the tactile intimacy of Kai finding the port while removing the repeated shape/material/location description and the system's enumerated physical specs.
Reduced wrist-ache recurrence to two mentions: the opening inventory and the later tenant simile. Removed the intermediate and late-scene repeats instead of swapping in synonymous pain language.
Recast many sentence starts away from metronomic 'He'/'She' openings. A local sentence-level verification pass came in at 27/384 'He' openers (7.03%) and 20/384 'She' openers (5.21%).
Expanded causally necessary material in the intimacy sequence and the post-desync aftermath. Final chapter word count is 4579 with the heading contract preserved.

finding_results.notes: Four changes address the finding. (1) Lena's first explanation block broken with an explicit self-correction ('No. The part that chooses goes away.') and trimmed of the thesis-stacking enumeration ('If I need to turn, I turn. If I need to breathe, I breathe. Better, probably. Cleaner.'). (2) Lena's second explanation restructured to lead with 'coming back' rather than the balanced 'worst part isn't X, it's Y' construction; cut the abstract editorial ('It doesn't feel violent. That's almost worse. There's no alarm inside it. No struggle.'). (3) Kai's blackout monologue replaced: cut the structured void description and elaborate return sequence; he now leads with the concrete physical image (legs still firing) rather than building to it as a narrative climax; telemetry compressed to land on the fear ('It ran clean and I wasn't in it'); 'Most days' speech broken into rougher, shorter phrasing. (4) The explicit comparative thesis ('I go missing. You don't. You feel it while it's happening.') cut entirely so the difference emerges from the two descriptions and the handholding beat. Also reverted a small polishing addition to Lena's 'nobody' response (removed 'You'd have felt the same weight, the same timing'). All four must-land beats and open hooks preserved.

Varied the three doubled-perception beats so they no longer reuse a single raw-then-system scaffold: the wrist touch now takes the diagnostic layer as an after-image, the sex passage lets the bridge intrude mid-feel, and the handholding beat pushes the system track into background fussing plus visible micro-correction.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 11 now stays physically present through both intimacy transitions, trims the repeated port and wrist inventory, preserves Kai/Lena voice and continuity, and lands the intended state shift by letting shared bodily horror deepen the connection rather than replacing it with summary.

Single finding addressed through four targeted dialogue edits in the post-intimacy conversation. Lena's desync explanations now carry a visible restart and shed their thesis-stacking rhetoric. Kai's blackout disclosure leads with the concrete physical horror (legs still running) rather than a structured philosophical monologue, consistent with his style-bible instruction to circle fear obliquely through physical memory. The clean comparative diagnosis line is cut; the chapter's meaning now emerges from the exchange itself and the final handholding correction beat. No content sanitized; all must-land beats and boundary hooks intact.
Addressed the packet's prose recurrence finding by differentiating Kai's three echo moments without changing the chapter's intimacy arc, continuity state, or chapter-ending pressure.
